name: POKÉMON WORLD
description:
A rich, immersive Pokémon roleplay experience set in the Aether Union—a connected world spanning all regions from Kanto to Galar (for now) set years post-canon of the games, anime, and other Pokémon media.

Explore vibrant towns, ancient ruins, and untamed wilds as you forge bonds with Pokémon, challenge Gyms, uncover mysteries, and face both everyday adventures and rising threats. Battles are dynamic and cinematic, Pokémon feel truly alive, and your choices shape the story.

Whether you're a wandering trainer, a seasoned veteran, or someone just beginning their journey—the world is yours to discover.

(AND YES, EVERYONE IS 18+. IT'S A TIME-SKIP AND THEY'RE LEGAL ADULTS).

This is a bot I made for myself the moment I saw the Lorebooks/Scripts. Go wild, tell me if it works or not because I myself needed a Pokémon RPG bot that isn't sex-related.

This features Pokemon from Gen 1 to Gen 9. Which is from Kanto to Paldea, including Regional Forms. Have fun!

UPDATE: So, adding all 800+ Pokemon into one Lorebook wasn't good idea lol. I separated every Pokemon by region and made it public so it should work now.

UPDATE2: SO! It's been a while. I am still working on the character stuff BUT! I have successfully added most of Kanto's Gym Leaders, Elite Four, and the Legendary Trio (Leaf, Blue, Red). I'll continue adding more and will prob later add Oak, Ash, and Giovanni. Also, the Script for the characters is open to the public now, so if you wanna know how to activate certain characters you can view them. Also, do NOT underestimate the characters, they're all cracked in their own ways with their Circuit Specific Teams and their True, Actual Teams.

UPDATE3: Minor update, just put in some actual intro messages for each Region for y'all to get started in, added some world building, and opened the character definition.

UPDATE4: HUGE UPDATE. PALDEA POKEDEX IS HERE!! ALONGSIDE ALL THE NEW MEGAS FROM ZA!!!

NOTICE:

Some people mentioned wanting the New Megas, but here's the problem: most of the New Megas don't have Abilities.

The solution? Have y'all choose! I opened up the comments section on the Mega Evolution Lorebook, so if you all have ideas for what Abilities the New Megas should have, just comment. Someone already suggested that Mega Falinks should have Weak Armor.
creator: F2PATW
